description:
Goal
Close the fact-readiness/evidence arc only after the implemented model is documented, observable, and mechanically protected from regression. The closeout proves the old concepts were removed, not renamed or hidden behind friendlier APIs.

Signal
- `cargo test --lib compiler2::` passes under hard timeout, plus the focused quicksort/Enum/reducer/type-evidence suites named by the preceding tickets.
- Docs match code: fact engine current/settled uses, semantic fixpoint, type specialization, type world, telemetry, and guide/northstar-facing material all describe fact readiness and semantic evidence as separate concepts.
- Telemetry exposes compact convergence signal: meaningful event counts, timeout event fields, activation frontier size, and no giant debug payload logs.
- Deletion checks run and are recorded for obsolete concepts: `DependencySnapshot`, `semantic_closure_is_current`, stale `FactValue::Inputs` docs, `ActivationKey` as body-input wording, recursive-only key widening, list-only `convergence_class`, raw closure-capture key defaults, `ReturnType` as ready `Ty`, missing-return-as-`none`, unresolved-as-`any`, and unbounded telemetry workflows.
- Any survivor is fixed here or becomes a new blocking ticket before `fz-rh2.18` closes.

Strategy
- Trust code/tests over old docs; replace outdated prose with the implemented shape and remove future-tense caveats that are no longer true.
- Add a small closeout test or script-like documented grep list only if it is useful signal; do not add scaffolding that future work must carry.
- Re-run the full compiler2 verification surface after docs and deletion checks, because stale tests/docs can mask old-world assumptions.
- If the broader pull-product/snapshot-ladder work is still desired, create a separate future epic from the verified current state instead of expanding this closeout.

Outro
No stale docs, no hidden compatibility paths, no unknown-as-type-value placeholders, no temporary fixture/test ignore left behind, no debug telemetry payload budgets, no unbounded `fz2 --log-telemetry` command, and no uncaptured future work discovered during the sweep.
title: Compiler2 fact readiness closeout: docs telemetry and deletion contract
